title: Desalination Process Engineering
entry_mechanism: Saudi engineering services company with international desalination EPC firm partnership
executive_summary:
Desalination process engineering — the technical design of desalination plant configurations, membrane system design, pre-treatment specifications, and energy optimisation — is a high-value professional service that flows almost entirely to foreign engineering firms (AECOM, Veolia, Mott MacDonald, Black & Veatch) for Saudi Arabia's new plant programmes. Creating a Saudi process engineering capability for desalination serves both the immediate economic goal (retaining professional services fees) and the strategic goal (Saudi design authority for Saudi water infrastructure).

Node DT-8 targets Saudi-led desalination process engineering: Saudi engineers leading the process design, optimisation, and commissioning support for new Saudi desalination capacity, with international EPC firms as JV partners initially and under Saudi engineering leadership by Phase II. The professional services opportunity is $50–80 million annually in design fees retained in-Kingdom.

companies.name: Veolia Water Technologies
companies.rationale: Veolia is the world's leading water technology and engineering company with major Saudi Arabia desalination design projects.
